hero.subtitle: Athletes, members, equipment, travel, training and more — all in one platform built for roller hockey clubs.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: 3 steps to a fully digital club.

steps.title: Register your club
steps.desc: Create your account in under 2 minutes. All you need is your club name and email.

steps.title: Import your data
steps.desc: Import athletes via CSV or add them one by one. The platform guides you at every step.

steps.title: Manage everything in one place
steps.desc: Real-time dashboard, automatic reports and full control of your club.

features.title: Everything your club needs
features.subtitle: 12 integrated modules, built specifically for roller hockey.

athletes.title: Athletes
athletes.desc: Complete profiles, monthly fee history, attendance tracking by season and age group.

members.title: Members
members.desc: Monthly membership fee management with visual calendar and payment tracking.

materials.title: Equipment & Textiles
materials.desc: Inventory by category, condition and assigned athlete.

training.title: Training & Tactics
training.desc: Attendance calendar and digital tactical board with animations.

travel.title: Travel
travel.desc: Full logistics: transport, drivers, meals and squad list.

finance.title: Finance
finance.desc: Dashboard with revenue, expenses and net balance in real time.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: One plan. Everything included. No surprises.
pricing.guarantee: Cancel anytime. No penalties or long-term commitment.

preview.title: See what you'll use every day
preview.subtitle: No fabricated demos. These are real screens from HoqueiManager.
preview.feesCaption: Full payment control per athlete, month by month. One click to record or edit.
preview.athletesCaption: All athletes in one place, with age group, age, contacts and quick actions.

cta.title: Ready to digitise your club?
cta.subtitle: The platform built specifically for roller hockey clubs.

items.q: Can I cancel at any time?
items.a: Yes. No contracts. You can cancel your subscription at any time from Settings — access is suspended immediately and billing stops. Your data is kept and you can reactivate whenever you want.
Yes. Each club's data is completely isolated. We use PostgreSQL with encryption and automatic daily backups in compliance with GDPR.
Yes. The platform is responsive and can be installed as a PWA app on Android and iOS — no app store needed.

items.q: Can I change the language later?
items.a: Yes. The dashboard language can be changed at any time in the club settings, with support for PT, ES, EN, FR and IT.

items.q: How many users can I have?
items.a: Unlimited. You can create accounts for coaches, directors, secretaries — each with granular permissions set by the admin.

items.q: Can I import data from another system?
items.a: Yes. The platform supports athlete import via CSV. For larger or custom imports, contact support.

items.q: What happens if a payment fails?
items.a: The system will retry automatically. You'll receive email notifications. The account is temporarily suspended if the issue isn't resolved within 7 days.
Your subscription is activated immediately after payment via Stripe. You can cancel at any time — access is suspended immediately, with no further charges.

register.title: Create account
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
